packageRules.description: Group and automerge GitHub Actions updates once its continuous-integration checks pass.
Automerge non-major devDependency updates once its continuous-integration checks pass.
Hold every major update for manual approval through the dependency dashboard.
Bump the pnpm package manager manually through the dependency dashboard.

Leave outcomeeng/gh-actions referenced at @main without SHA-pinning — the spec-tree workflows deliberately track the branch to surface upstream changes early during beta, and pin to a digest only when the product graduates to production usage.
Automerge non-major vulnerability fixes once its continuous-integration checks pass.
Hold major vulnerability fixes for manual approval through the dependency dashboard.
Hold pnpm package-manager vulnerability fixes for manual approval, overriding the non-major automerge above by matching last.
